summary: Top‑notch soundboard capture of an enviously strong set, delivering crystal‑clear audio that lives up to the hype.
review: The reviewer hails this recording as a long‑awaited, top‑quality capture that sounds superb on any playback system. While no specific songs are singled out, the setlist itself is described as enviable, suggesting a strong overall performance. The sound quality is praised as “very good sounding” and “top notch,” indicating an excellent source.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed, highly positive review; recording quality is described as excellent and the show is implied to be strong, leading to a high rating but limited confidence due to single source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear, very good sounding; no issues mentioned by reviewer.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set list praised as impressive and enviable, indicating a solid flow.
